report.summary: Idle cycle — zero new commits since Mar 17 (Day 64); 414 published slugs with 311 page.tsx present; uncommitted working tree modifications detected across ~20 files; 4 carry-over items unchanged; defi-yields fallback remains only critical gap.

sections.title: QA Sweep
items: Page audit: 414 published slugs parsed (+2 from last cycle), 311 have page.tsx files (+2), 103 pre-scaffolded future pages (unchanged)
Publish queue: EMPTY — all planned pages promoted to production
No new commits since e999560 (Mar 17, Day 64) — zero regression risk from deployed code

Uncommitted modifications detected in working tree: ~20+ files including middleware.ts, next.config.ts, layout.tsx, globals.css, multiple page.tsx files (airdrops, compare/exchanges, crypto-cards, gamification, learn guides, market-recap, not-found)
Known JSX issue persists: crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx has unescaped > in string literals; low severity due to ignoreBuildErrors:true
Live HTTP verification blocked by sandbox egress — cannot confirm 200s directly
No new deployed code — no new test failures possible in production

sections.title: Data Pipeline Health
items: /api/prices — CoinGecko markets, 60s TTL, in-memory cache + stale fallback ✓, X-Cache-Source header ✓
/api/trending — CoinGecko trending, 300s TTL, in-memory cache + stale-on-catch fallback ✓, MISSING X-Cache-Source header
/api/fear-greed — alternative.me, 600s TTL, in-memory cache + stale-on-catch fallback ✓, MISSING X-Cache-Source header
/api/market-metrics — CoinGecko global + fear-greed, 60s TTL, in-memory cache ✓, uses X-Cache instead of X-Cache-Source (inconsistent)
/api/market-dominance — CoinGecko global, 300s TTL, in-memory cache + FALLBACK_DATA constant ✓, X-Cache-Source ✓ (best pattern)
CRITICAL: /api/defi-yields — DefiLlama, 300s cache headers only, NO in-memory cache, NO fallback data — returns 500 on upstream failure (UNCHANGED from last cycle)
Auxiliary routes present: cache-stats, health, news-rss, newsletter, notifications, og, standup-email, subscribe — not part of core 6 public data routes

sections.title: Infrastructure & Deployment
items: Latest deploy: commit e999560 (Day 64 publish, Mar 17) — 6 days idle, no new deploys
Uncommitted working tree changes NOT deployed — production unchanged
next.config: standalone output, trailingSlash, ignoreBuildErrors:true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency:4, workerThreads:false — stable
Middleware: Edge-compatible, PILLAR_PAGES inlined, security headers present
Static assets: Cache-Control immutable 1yr max-age on _next/static — correct
Cannot verify live Vercel status from sandbox — no egress access to degen0x.com

sections.title: PM Wrap-Up
items: Shipped this cycle: Nothing — site idle since Day 64 publish (Mar 17)
Uncommitted work in progress: ~20+ modified files in working tree — needs review and commit decision
Publish queue: EMPTY — next pages require new content scaffolding
Carry-over (critical): Add fallback data + in-memory cache to /api/defi-yields — only route that 500s on upstream failure
Carry-over (medium): Add X-Cache-Source headers to /api/trending and /api/fear-greed
Carry-over (medium): Rename X-Cache to X-Cache-Source in /api/market-metrics for consistency
Carry-over (low): Fix JSX unescaped > in crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx
NEW flag: Uncommitted modifications in working tree should be reviewed — risk of drift between local and deployed state
103 published slugs still lack page.tsx — future content placeholders, not regressions
No urgent blockers requiring Jefe's attention — site is stable but idle
